title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The video argues that despite US dominance in AI chips, infrastructure, and models, China has a structural advantage in power generation and transmission at the scale required for new AI data centers. The US fragmented governance across federal, state, and local levels slows infrastructure deployment compared to China's centralized approach through NDRC and NEA coordination.
